name: app.R
content:
library(shiny)
library(shinydashboard)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(readxl)

scores_person <- read_xlsx("data/scores_person.xlsx")

# ==============================================================================
# UI
# ==============================================================================
ui <- dashboardPage(
  dashboardHeader(title = "Survey Recommendations Dashboard"),
  
  dashboardSidebar(
    sidebarMenu(
      menuItem("Dashboard", tabName = "dashboard", icon = icon("dashboard")),
      menuItem("Data Table", tabName = "datatable", icon = icon("table"))
    ),
    
    hr(),
    
    # Profile Type Selector
    selectInput("profileType", 
                "Profile Type:",
                choices = c("Lived experience" = "lived_experience", "Region" = "region"),
                selected = "lived_experience"),
    
    # Profile Value Selector (dynamic based on profile type)
    uiOutput("profileSelector"),
    
    hr(),
    
    # Stats boxes in sidebar
    valueBoxOutput("totalResponses", width = 12),
    valueBoxOutput("avgScore", width = 12)
  ),
  
  dashboardBody(
    tabItems(
      # Dashboard tab
      tabItem(tabName = "dashboard",
              fluidRow(
                valueBoxOutput("highestScore", width = 3),
                valueBoxOutput("lowestScore", width = 3),
                valueBoxOutput("responseCount", width = 3),
                valueBoxOutput("avgScoreBox", width = 3)
              ),
              
              fluidRow(
                box(
                  title = "Average Scores by Recommendation",
                  status = "primary",
                  solidHeader = TRUE,
                  width = 12,
                  # base R plot with click
                  plotOutput("mainChart", height = "500px",
                             click = "mainChart_click")
                )
              ),
              
              fluidRow(
                box(
                  title = "Profile Breakdown",
                  status = "info",
                  solidHeader = TRUE,
                  width = 12,
                  plotOutput("profileChart", height = "350px"),
                  uiOutput("clearSelection")
                )
              )
      ),
      
      # Data Table tab
      tabItem(tabName = "datatable",
              fluidRow(
                box(
                  title = "Detailed Scores Table",
                  status = "primary",
                  solidHeader = TRUE,
                  width = 12,
                  DTOutput("detailTable")
                )
              )
      )
    )
  )
)

# ==============================================================================
# SERVER
# ==============================================================================
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Reactive: Load and prepare data
  survey_data <- reactive(scores_person)
  
  # Dynamic profile selector
  output$profileSelector <- renderUI({
    if (input$profileType == "lived_experience") {
      choices <- c("All participants" = "all", 
                   unique(survey_data()$lived_experience))
    } else {
      choices <- c("All Regions" = "all", 
                   unique(survey_data()$region))
    }
    
    selectInput(
      "profileValue",
      paste("Select", ifelse(input$profileType == "lived_experience",
                             "Lived Experience", "Region"), ":"),
      choices = choices,
      selected = "all"
    )
  })
  
  # Reactive: Filtered data based on profile selection
  filtered_data <- reactive({
    req(input$profileValue)
    
    data <- survey_data()
    
    if (input$profileValue != "all") {
      if (input$profileType == "lived_experience") {
        data <- data %>% dplyr::filter(lived_experience == input$profileValue)
      } else {
        data <- data %>% dplyr::filter(region == input$profileValue)
      }
    }
    
    data
  })
  
  # Reactive: Average scores by recommendation
  avg_scores <- reactive({
    filtered_data() %>%
      group_by(recommendation_id, recommendation, recommendation_wrapped) %>%
      summarise(
        avg_score = round(mean(score, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
        response_count = n(),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      arrange(recommendation_id)
  })
  
  # Reactive: Overall statistics
  overall_stats <- reactive({
    data <- filtered_data()
    list(
      total_responses = n_distinct(data$person_id),
      avg_score       = round(mean(data$score, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      highest_score   = round(max(data$score, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
      lowest_score    = round(min(data$score, na.rm = TRUE), 1)
    )
  })
  
  # Selected recommendation for drill-down
  selected_rec <- reactiveVal(NULL)
  
  # Store bar positions for click mapping
  bar_positions <- reactiveVal(NULL)
  
  # Reactive: Profile breakdown for selected recommendation
  profile_breakdown <- reactive({
    req(selected_rec())
    
    data <- survey_data() %>%
      filter(recommendation_id == selected_rec())
    
    if (input$profileType == "lived_experience") {
      data %>%
        group_by(lived_experience) %>%
        summarise(
          avg_score = round(mean(score, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
          count     = n(),
          .groups   = "drop"
        ) %>%
        rename(profile = lived_experience)
    } else {
      data %>%
        group_by(region) %>%
        summarise(
          avg_score = round(mean(score, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
          count     = n(),
          .groups   = "drop"
        ) %>%
        rename(profile = region)
    }
  })
  
  # Value boxes
  output$totalResponses <- renderValueBox({
    valueBox(
      overall_stats()$total_responses,
      "Total Responses",
      icon = icon("users"),
      color = "blue"
    )
  })
  
  output$avgScore <- renderValueBox({
    valueBox(
      overall_stats()$avg_score,
      "Average Score",
      icon = icon("star"),
      color = "green"
    )
  })
  
  output$highestScore <- renderValueBox({
    valueBox(
      overall_stats()$highest_score,
      "Highest Score",
      icon = icon("arrow-up"),
      color = "green"
    )
  })
  
  output$lowestScore <- renderValueBox({
    valueBox(
      overall_stats()$lowest_score,
      "Lowest Score",
      icon = icon("arrow-down"),
      color = "orange"
    )
  })
  
  output$responseCount <- renderValueBox({
    valueBox(
      overall_stats()$total_responses,
      "Total Responses",
      icon = icon("chart-bar"),
      color = "blue"
    )
  })
  
  output$avgScoreBox <- renderValueBox({
    valueBox(
      overall_stats()$avg_score,
      "Average Score",
      icon = icon("chart-line"),
      color = "purple"
    )
  })
  
  # Main bar chart (base R)
  output$mainChart <- renderPlot({
    data <- avg_scores()
    validate(need(nrow(data) > 0, "No data to display"))
    
    # Color coding based on score
    cols <- ifelse(
      data$avg_score >= 80, "#10b981",
      ifelse(
        data$avg_score >= 60, "#3b82f6",
        ifelse(data$avg_score >= 40, "#f59e0b", "#ef4444")
      )
    )
    
    labels <- paste0("R", data$recommendation_id)
    
    # Make room for rotated x labels
    op <- par(mar = c(8, 4, 2, 1))
    on.exit(par(op))
    
    mids <- barplot(
      height     = data$avg_score,
      names.arg  = labels,
      col        = cols,
      ylim       = c(0, 100),
      las        = 2,               # rotate x labels
      ylab       = "Average Score",
      xlab       = "Recommendation ID"
    )
    
    # Store mapping of bar midpoints to recommendation_id
    bar_positions(
      data.frame(
        x     = as.numeric(mids),
        recid = data$recommendation_id
      )
    )
  })
  
  # Handle bar click for drill-down (base plot click)
  observeEvent(input$mainChart_click, {
    pos <- bar_positions()
    click <- input$mainChart_click
    req(!is.null(pos), !is.null(click$x))
    
    # Find nearest bar midpoint to click x-coordinate
    idx <- which.min(abs(pos$x - click$x))
    if (length(idx) == 1 && !is.na(idx)) {
      selected_rec(pos$recid[idx])
    }
  })
  
  # Profile breakdown chart (base R)
  output$profileChart <- renderPlot({
    if (is.null(selected_rec())) {
      plot.new()
      title("Click on a recommendation bar above to see profile breakdown")
    } else {
      data <- profile_breakdown()
      validate(need(nrow(data) > 0, "No data for this recommendation"))
      
      # Get recommendation name for title
      rec_name <- survey_data() %>%
        filter(recommendation_id == selected_rec()) %>%
        pull(recommendation) %>%
        unique()
      
      labels  <- data$profile
      heights <- data$avg_score
      
      op <- par(mar = c(6, 4, 4, 1))
      on.exit(par(op))
      
      barplot(
        height    = heights,
        names.arg = labels,
        col       = "#6366f1",
        ylim      = c(0, 100),
        las       = 2,
        ylab      = "Average Score",
        main      = paste0(rec_name)
      )
    }
  })
  
  # Clear selection button
  output$clearSelection <- renderUI({
    if (!is.null(selected_rec())) {
      actionButton("clearBtn", "Clear Selection", class = "btn-primary")
    }
  })
  
  observeEvent(input$clearBtn, {
    selected_rec(NULL)
  })
  
  # Detailed data table
  output$detailTable <- renderDT({
    data <- avg_scores() %>%
      select(
        ID             = recommendation_id, 
        Recommendation = recommendation, 
        `Avg Score`    = avg_score, 
        Responses      = response_count
      )
    
    datatable(
      data, 
      options = list(
        pageLength = 25,
        order      = list(list(2, "desc"))
      ),
      rownames = FALSE
    )
  })
}

shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)

name: Shiny-git.Rproj
content:
Version: 1.0

RestoreWorkspace: Default
SaveWorkspace: Default
AlwaysSaveHistory: Default

EnableCodeIndexing: Yes
UseSpacesForTab: Yes
NumSpacesForTab: 2
Encoding: UTF-8

RnwWeave: Sweave
LaTeX: pdfLaTeX
